sub.title: Subscription URL
sub.intro: Import this URL into a supported client. Resetting credentials immediately invalidates the old URL.
sub.qr_hint: Scan the QR code on the left from your mobile client to import directly.
sub.masked_hint: Subscription URL is hidden — tap 👁 to reveal both URL and QR. The copy button works without revealing.
sub.reset_warn: Resetting credentials immediately invalidates the old subscription URL and forces all connections to drop. Continue?

rules.title: My personal rules
rules.placeholder: One rule per line. Higher priority than site rule sets.

emergency.title: Emergency access
emergency.intro: After expiry or traffic limit exceeded, emergency access can temporarily restore connection for {{hours}} hour(s) ({{remaining}} remaining).
emergency.status_available: After expiry or traffic limit exceeded, this can temporarily restore connection for {{hours}} hour(s).
emergency.status_no_quota: Emergency access has no remaining uses.
emergency.status_not_eligible: Your account has not expired and has not exceeded its traffic limit yet.
emergency.status_invalid_settings: Emergency access settings are incomplete. Contact an administrator.
emergency.status_unavailable: Emergency access is not available right now.
emergency.traffic_quota_hint: Each window allows up to {{total}} of traffic
emergency.no_quota: Emergency access has no remaining uses

import.title: Import to client
import.intro: Pick your client and tap Import — it'll auto-configure via URL Scheme. Tap Install if you don't have the client yet.
